auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ClassMarker API key used together with your API secret to generate a lowercase SHA256 request signature. Create both values in your ClassMarker account under API access: https://www.classmarker.com/online-testing/api/developers/

extraFields.label: API Secret
extraFields.description: ClassMarker API secret paired with your API key for SHA256 request signing. Copy it when you create the API key in your ClassMarker account under API access: https://www.classmarker.com/online-testing/api/developers/

actions.name: list_groups_links_and_tests
actions.description: List the ClassMarker groups, links, and assigned tests that the current API key can access.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for listing ClassMarker groups and links.

raw.description: The raw ClassMarker assigned test payload.

items.description: A ClassMarker test assigned to a group or link.

assignedTests.description: The tests assigned to this group.

items.description: A ClassMarker group with its assigned tests.

groups.description: The groups accessible to the API key.

anyOf.description: The ClassMarker link name when present.
The unique link URL identifier when available.
The quiz URL identifier used to launch the link when available.
The ClassMarker access list identifier when available.

raw.description: The raw ClassMarker assigned test payload.

items.description: A ClassMarker test assigned to a group or link.

assignedTests.description: The tests assigned to this link.

items.description: A ClassMarker link with its assigned tests.

links.description: The links accessible to the API key.

outputSchema.description: The groups, links, and assigned tests available to the API key.

actions.name: list_recent_group_results
actions.description: List recent ClassMarker results across all groups the current API key can access.

finishedAfterTimestamp.description: The UNIX timestamp in seconds used to fetch only newer ClassMarker results.

limit.description: The maximum number of recent results to request.

inputSchema.description: The shared input for recent ClassMarker results.

anyOf.description: The finishedAfterTimestamp value that ClassMarker actually used.

groups.description: The groups referenced by the recent results.

items.description: A ClassMarker test summary returned with recent results.

tests.description: The tests referenced by the recent results.

anyOf.description: The ClassMarker group user identifier when present.
The learner first name when present.
The learner last name when present.
The learner email when present.
The group identifier when the result came from a group.
The link identifier when the result came from a link.
The percentage score.
The points scored.
The total available points.
The UNIX timestamp when the attempt started.
The UNIX timestamp when the attempt finished.
The ClassMarker attempt status code.
The formatted attempt duration.
The required passmark percentage.
Whether the learner passed.
Whether the result still requires manual grading according to ClassMarker.
Whether certificates are only issued when the learner passes.
The certificate URL when available.
The certificate serial when available.
The URL for viewing the result when available.
The ClassMarker test type label.
The access code used for link results when available.
The external ClassMarker user identifier when available.
The learner IP address when available.
The first extra info field when available.
The second extra info field when available.
The third extra info field when available.
The fourth extra info field when available.
The fifth extra info field when available.
Whether browser monitoring is enabled or disabled.
Whether camera monitoring is enabled or disabled.
The total number of monitor events.
The total number of seconds away from the test.

event.description: The event name returned by ClassMarker.

secondsAway.description: The seconds away value returned by ClassMarker.

raw.description: The raw ClassMarker monitor event payload.

anyOf.description: ClassMarker monitor event details.
The total number of results available to download.
The number of results returned in this response.
Whether more results exist for the next finishedAfterTimestamp request.
The timestamp to use for the next incremental recent-results request.
